description: Responsible on the development and maintenance of the Ahorrobus app, and the development of the Teper app.
As a Developer at Grupo Nach assigned to Banco Azteca, I have been responsible for developing credit-related features, resolving production incidents, and addressing technical debt.
At BigSmart, I spearheaded the digital transformation by migrating hybrid applications into high-performance, modular native Android systems.
As an Android Developer at Gendra, I spearheaded the development and maintenance of the Ahorrobus and Teper applications, ensuring high-quality mobile solutions.
As an Android Developer at AsTecsI, I was responsible for the end-to-end development and ongoing maintenance of the B.E.A. application.
As a Jr. Developer at EON Igniting Business, I delivered web and Android solutions for a diverse portfolio of clients.
